import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const Home = () => { const stats = [ { label: 'Active Candidates', value: '50k+' }, { label: 'Industries Served', value: '15+' }, { label: 'Placements Done', value: '12k+' }, { label: 'Global Partners', value: '250+' }, ]; const processSteps = [ { title: 'Sourcing', desc: 'Finding talent via global networks.' }, { title: 'Screening', desc: 'Rigorous technical interviews.' }, { title: 'Verification', desc: 'Strict background checks.' }, { title: 'Placement', desc: 'Final onboarding at client site.' }, ]; const solutions = [ { icon: '💼', title: 'Healthcare Staffing', desc: 'Connecting professionals with top medical facilities.' }, { icon: '💻', title: 'US/EU Sourcing', desc: 'Global talent sourcing for technical & IT roles.' }, { icon: '⚙️', title: 'Industrial Solutions', desc: 'Expert manpower for manufacturing & production.' }, { icon: '🍵', title: 'Hospitality & F&B', desc: 'Certified professionals for luxury service.' }, { icon: '🧪', title: 'Chemical Sector', desc: 'Experienced technicians for process management.' }, ]; const faqs = [ { q: "How long does the recruitment process take?", a: "Typically, we provide shortlisted candidates within 7-14 business days depending on the industry." }, { q: "Do you provide international staffing?", a: "Yes, we specialize in US/EU sourcing and have a robust global network." }, { q: "Is background verification included?", a: "Absolutely. Every candidate undergoes a strict 3-step document and reference verification." } ]; return (
{/* 1. HERO SECTION (Light - Professional) */}

WE FIND
THE UNFINDABLE.

Bridging the gap between global industries and top-tier technical talent.

{/* 2. STATS SECTION (Dark - Impactful) */}
{stats.map((s, i) => (

{s.value}

{s.label}

))}
{/* 3. SOLUTIONS SECTION (Light - Clean) */}

TALENT
REDEFINED.

Expert workforce solutions for Electrical, Electronic and Energy industries worldwide.

{solutions.map((item, index) => (
{item.icon}

{item.title}

{item.desc}

Learn More →
))}
{/* 4. PROCESS SECTION (Dark - Futuristic) */}

OUR PROCESS

{processSteps.map((step, i) => (
{i+1}

{step.title}

{step.desc}

))}
{/* 5. INDUSTRY EXPERTISE (Light - Modern Grid) */}

INDUSTRY EXPERTISE

{['Oil & Gas', 'Electronics', 'Chemical'].map((ind, i) => (

{ind}

  • ✔ High-End Operations
  • ✔ Verified Compliance
  • ✔ 24/7 Deployment
))}
{/* 6. TESTIMONIALS (Dark - Elegant) */}
“

"Hudson Manpower provided us with high-quality chemical technicians within just 2 weeks. Their technical screening is unmatched."

Rajesh Khanna

HR Manager, PetroChem India

{/* 7. FAQ & CONTACT (Light - Clean Split) */}

FAQS

{faqs.map((faq, i) => (

Q: {faq.q}

{faq.a}

))}

CUSTOM SOLUTIONS?

Schedule a consultation with our industry experts.

{/* 8. CTA BANNER (Dark - The Closing) */}

READY TO HIRE
GLOBAL TALENT?

{/* 9. FOOTER (Dark) */}

HUDSON.

World-class manpower solutions for high-stakes technical industries.
